channel.title: Posts on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog

item.title: Kvm Virtualization 01
item.description: KVM virtualization serial Today we are start to learn kvm vritualizatio

item.title: Learning build Network with vyos
item.description: Learning Networking with Vyos Vyos is a debian base router. it is fork form vyatta core.It is very stable and fast router OS. It hasn’t web UI, but only command line configration just like JUNOS. At now, vyos version will be vyos version 1.2 released. I will wirte the turtural with vyos 1.2RC4. Install vyos Download vyos form the office website: vyos-1.2.0-rc-4-amd64

item.title: How to Install Dotnetcore2.1.x and Aspdotnetcore2.1.x on RHEL6.x or CentOS6
item.description: How to install netcore/aspnetcore 2.1.4 on RHEL 6.8 Recently days, we met a scenario that is our client production environment must be RHEL 6.8. But our product is base asp.net core 2.1.x version. Rehat and Microsoft has never say the are support RHEL 6.X version. After a few days research, I found that .net core website is support RHEL 6.X,but no runtime.We can download install SDK to support asp.net core.

item.title: How to Build Blog With Hugo on Github
item.description: How to build a blog with Hugo on github.io Hugo on your MacOS Install hugo brew install hugo

item.title: Fist_Blog
item.description: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step THis a blog to be build as my knowleage base.
